revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:速佐須良比売神]]
{{ill|Hayasasurahime|ja|速佐須良比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayasasurahime|qq=}} '''no Kami''' (速佐須良比売神) is one of the four {{ill|lt=Haraiya no Kamigami|Haraedo no Kami|lt=Haraedo no Kami|lt=Haraedo no Ōkami|ja|祓戸大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lt=Haraiya no Kamigami|qq=}} mentioned in the {{ill|Ōharae no Kotoba|en|Ōharae no Kotoba|qid=Q11438317|lt=Ōharae Kotoba|1=Ōharae no Kotoba}}. Other names include '''Hayasasura-hime Ōkami''', '''Hayasasura-hime no Kami''', '''Hayasasura-hime no Mikoto''', '''Hayasasura-hime no Son''', and '''Hayasasura-hime-me no Kami'''. In some cases, the character for "売" may be written as "賣." This deity is not mentioned in the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}, or {{ill|Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|lt=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|lt=Izumo Fudoki|ja|出雲風土記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Fudoki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 出雲国風土記}}. == Overview == {{ill|Ibukidonushi no Kami|lt=Ibukidonushi no Kami|lt=Ibukidomushi no Kami|ja|気吹戸主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibukidomushi no Kami|qq=}} disperses breath to remove various calamities, sins, and impurities to the {{ill|Ne-no-kuni|en|Ne-no-kuni|qid=Q7555425|lt=Netherworld (Yomi)|1=Ne-no-kuni}} and {{ill|Bottom world (Soko)|ja|底の国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bottom world (Soko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, where they are lost and dissipated. Hayasasurahime no Kami is the final deity among the four Haraiya no Kamigami to appear in this process. As a result, the proclamation states that "from today onward, there shall be no sins" (あらじ, meaning "none")<ref>From the Ōharae Kotoba</ref>.
She is considered a daughter of {{ill|Izanagi no Mikoto|ja|伊弉諾尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanagi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イザナギ|1=Izanagi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q813858}}<ref>From the Harai Kotoba or Misogi no Ōharae (purification rites)</ref>. However, she is not found in {{ill|Kiki|ja|記紀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Kiki (Shinto)|qid=Q842308}} or widely represented in shrine records and folklore, making her a mysterious deity.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|qid=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga|1=Motoori Norinaga}}, a scholar of {{ill|Kokugaku|en|Kokugaku|qid=Q855159|lt=Kokugaku|1=Kokugaku}}, identified Hayasasurahime no Kami with {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime no Mikoto|ja|須世理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseri-Hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}.
== Shrines Dedicated to Hayasasurahime no Kami == * {{ill|Hibiya Shrine|ja|日比谷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibiya Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|港区|en|港区|qid=Q14219833|lt=Minato City|1=港区}}) * {{ill|Katayama Shrine (Kameyama)|ja|片山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Shrine (Kameyama)|qq=}} ({{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kameyama, Mie|en|Kameyama, Mie|qid=Q646858|lt=Kameyama|1=Kameyama, Mie}}) * {{ill|Nijūgohashira Shrine|ja|二十五柱神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nijūgohashira Shrine|qq=}} (Matsusaka, Mie Prefecture) * {{ill|Urashima Shrine|ja|浦嶋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urashima Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ine, Kyoto|en|Ine, Kyoto|qid=Q1345614|lt=Ine Town|1=Ine, Kyoto}}) * {{ill|Sakunado Shrine|ja|佐久奈度神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakunado Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|qid=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu|1=Ōtsu}}) * Kawasuso-no-miya Karasaki Shrine (Shiga Prefecture, Takashima City) * Yasura Shrine (Shiga Prefecture, Kusatsu City) * Hayakawa Shrine (Tottori City) * {{ill|Hayakawa Shrine (Saito)|ja|速川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayakawa Shrine (Saito)|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|qid=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}, {{ill|Saito, Miyazaki|en|Saito, Miyazaki|qid=Q850479|lt=Saito City|1=Saito, Miyazaki}})
== Notes == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Japanese deities|en|List of Japanese deities|qid=Q3240847|lt=List of Japanese deities|1=List of Japanese deities}} * {{ill|lt=Haraiya no Kamigami|Haraedo no Kami|lt=Haraedo no Kami|lt=Haraedo no Ōkami|ja|祓戸大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lt=Haraiya no Kamigami|qq=}}
